## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Sunbit and GrowthX to discuss content production, automation, and future opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/4C4eTKGz9Cnbhy5uy_cMB7xzuCxz_D1D?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [29 new content pieces ready for review, including social posts for 5 pre-published articles](https://fathom.video/share/4C4eTKGz9Cnbhy5uy_cMB7xzuCxz_D1D?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Automation plans discussed to streamline content publishing workflow and social media posting](https://fathom.video/share/4C4eTKGz9Cnbhy5uy_cMB7xzuCxz_D1D?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Strong SEO performance and site metrics reported, with plans for site redesign and content reorganization](https://fathom.video/share/4C4eTKGz9Cnbhy5uy_cMB7xzuCxz_D1D?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Potential future collaborations explored, including email marketing, ad creation, and community building](https://fathom.video/share/4C4eTKGz9Cnbhy5uy_cMB7xzuCxz_D1D?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [29 new pieces ready in content OS, status to be changed to "ready for review"](https://fathom.video/share/4C4eTKGz9Cnbhy5uy_cMB7xzuCxz_D1D?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Social posts created for 5 pre-published articles (LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, Twitter)](https://fathom.video/share/4C4eTKGz9Cnbhy5uy_cMB7xzuCxz_D1D?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Adding slugs and keywords to new and existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/4C4eTKGz9Cnbhy5uy_cMB7xzuCxz_D1D?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Focus on automation to clear backlog and maintain efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/4C4eTKGz9Cnbhy5uy_cMB7xzuCxz_D1D?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)

### Automation Plans

  - [Engineering team ready to work with JSON file and endpoint for content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/4C4eTKGz9Cnbhy5uy_cMB7xzuCxz_D1D?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Potential to automate social media posting through Sprout Social](https://fathom.video/share/4C4eTKGz9Cnbhy5uy_cMB7xzuCxz_D1D?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Workflow consideration:](https://fathom.video/share/4C4eTKGz9Cnbhy5uy_cMB7xzuCxz_D1D?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
      - [Trigger JSON webhook when content moves to "review" status](https://fathom.video/share/4C4eTKGz9Cnbhy5uy_cMB7xzuCxz_D1D?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
      - [Send through Monday.com for legal review](https://fathom.video/share/4C4eTKGz9Cnbhy5uy_cMB7xzuCxz_D1D?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Auto-populate images from stock database with manual selection option](https://fathom.video/share/4C4eTKGz9Cnbhy5uy_cMB7xzuCxz_D1D?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)

### SEO and Site Performance

  - [Overall positive metrics across the board since March](https://fathom.video/share/4C4eTKGz9Cnbhy5uy_cMB7xzuCxz_D1D?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [Increased non-branded clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/4C4eTKGz9Cnbhy5uy_cMB7xzuCxz_D1D?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
